top_signals.title: Gold Drops on Rate-Hike Fears as Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Over
top_signals.summary: Gold dropped as US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran has ended, stoking concerns that a renewal of fighting could again drive inflation and push up interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Corporate report: The Value of Resilience: Cyber Resilience in Financial Services
top_signals.summary: Evidence on how cyber resilience can reduce disruption costs, support growth and strengthen financial performance in UK financial services.

top_signals.title: Osaka payment processor bankruptcy triggers restaurant cash crunch fears
Strategy’s 3,588 BTC sale puts future bitcoin selling in focus: analysts
top_signals.summary: Strategy sold 3,588 BTC last week, with CF Benchmarks suggesting continued sales would become a concern if they stop being a choice.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
